name: SHUHUA
title: A Star's Dream
mainAbility: Power of the Wolf / Melee Combat

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

passive.name: On the Stage / High-energy / Performance
passive.description: The entire team gains [FOREVER] (+5% damage dealt, stacks up to 3 times, Infinite) when entering the Encore Mission and Instance Dungeon. Using Pop Star Landing activates [On the Stage]: activates [Performance] effect every 3s, Duration: 15s. [Performance]: Core Attack damage +50%, grants Shield (10% ATK), Duration: 3s. Using Starlight Bark/Howl activates [High-energy]: Rhythmic Beatdown → High-energy Beat (+50% damage); when Core Attack activates and High-energy Beat is used it doesn't consume Core Gauge; when Core Attack hits, cooldowns of Pop Star Landing, Starlight Bark/Howl reduced by 3s (Cooldown: 1s); can only apply to up to 6 consecutive Core Attacks; Duration: 3.5s.

advancements: [High-energy] enhanced: High-energy Beat damage +100%, cooldown reduction on Core Attack hit +5s. Each time High-energy Beat hits it inflicts [Tension Drop] on target: Water damage taken from SHUHUA +1%, Duration: 30s, stacks up to 10 times.
Starlight Bark changes to Starlight Howl, increasing the user's damage by 100%.
[Performance] enhanced: Core Attack damage +55%, Shield (15% ATK), Power Gauge +10%, activates [Tension Up]: Water damage +20%, Duration: 3s.
Using Starlight Howl activates [Volume Up]: damage dealt +30%, Critical Hit Rate +30%, Duration: 10s. Attack speed of High-energy Beat significantly increases.
